template_data.headline_html: The Schedule is access. The pipeline is work.
template_data.image_prompt: Split-panel before/after infographic, horizontal layout. Left panel dark navy: bold label 'PASSIVE' at top-left with red X icon. Three short labels stacked: 'WAITING', 'NO ALERTS', 'NO REACH'. Illustrated professional sitting slumped at desk, looking uncertain. Right panel cream/white: bold label 'ACTIVE' at top-right with green checkmark icon. Three short labels stacked: 'SOURCES SOUGHT', 'RECOMPETE LIST', 'AWARD WON'. Illustrated professional standing at desk, phone in hand, confident posture. Bold headline centered at top: 'ACTIVE PIPELINE WINS CONTRACTS'. Thin dividing line between panels. Bottom dark navy band. Footer text: 'William Hill · GSA Focus'.
